title: Phase 7a Bug Hunt — Real-World Test Pass
subtitle: Bugs found by driving the actual CLI on real inputs

rows.symptom: UnicodeEncodeError on Windows cp1252 console for ✓ ✗ — glyphs
Treated bridge.lint() return as findings list (was {findings, summary} dict); also lumped info-level findings as failures
rows.fix: Extract .get('findings', []) and split by severity (error/warning blocking, info informational)

rows.symptom: Returned passed=False for any finding including info-level — would falsely fail every artifact whose design has the @google/design.md token-count info
